title: Language Change - Disconnecting/Connecting earbuds to check DFU pop up
scenario: Language update fails with persistent pop-up when one earbud is disconnected during firmware update on Voyager Free 60+
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to Home screen and tap on the connected device name to enter Device Settings.
3. In Device Settings, scroll to and tap on 'Language'.
4. On the Language screen, select a different language from the list.
5. Tap the 'Update Now' button to apply the language change.
6. While the update process is starting, remove the right earbud from your ear and place it into the charging case so it disconnects.
7. Observe the pop-up that appears on screen.
8. Reconnect the right earbud by removing it from the charging case.
9. Check if the pop-up automatically dismisses after reconnection.
10. If the pop-up persists, tap 'Ok' to dismiss it and note the screen you are returned to.
11. Repeat steps 1–10, but this time disconnect the left earbud (step 6) instead of the right.
expected: When one earbud is disconnected during a language update, a pop-up should appear stating "Update currently not available, please try back later". Reconnecting the earbud should automatically dismiss the pop-up and allow the update to proceed or resume.
